_note: In-namespace RBAC lab, vcluster disabled (plain OpenShift session ns). All --as impersonation checks (before/after/delete) evaluate viewer-bot's OWN scoped permissions, not the caller's, so they behave identically on CRC and real DCS -- kept as exercises. The one denial that checks the SESSION SA's own rights, verify-can-i-get-pods-kube-system-no, is expect_fail: the portless CRC session SA has cluster-admin-ish rights and CAN read kube-system (returns 'yes'), so the 'no' isolation assertion only holds on real DCS where the tenant SA is namespace-scoped. sleep 3 after the RoleBinding apply covers RBAC propagation before the 'after' check (the content examiner's retries/.INF is not honored when the grader script is run directly).

steps.run: oc auth can-i get pods -n kube-system
oc describe rolebinding $(oc get rolebindings -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}')
